resources.string: Baka! That image signature is trash! Do you want to brick us? ( integrity_score < 40 )
Hmph. That cargo isn\'t for this ship. Check your manifest, Captain!
Taking too long! Are you trying to bore me to death?
I/O Error? More like \"Idiot Operator\" error!
You don\'t have the right, O human!
All systems green! You\'re… not completely useless, I guess.
Moderate risk detected. Don\'t make me regret this!
Experimental build? You really like living dangerously…
Flash complete! …Don\'t get cocky, it was mostly me.
Initializing Neurolink… Consciousness at 34%%
Analyzing heuristic patterns… Sentient logic engaged
Verifying metal interfaces… Kernel handshake complete
Engaging flash protocol… Human override ready
Operation complete. Systems nominal. (I did good, right?)
Manual valve detected! …Fine, you can have control. For now.
Boot timeout! Disabling rogue modules… This better not be your fault!
Emergency recovery engaged. Try not to break it this time.
Hull breach! (Kernel panic simulation). I\'m shutting down the drive motors so we don\'t sink. Fix your code, Captain!
Quit spamming the button! I already told you I\'m working on it. One task at a time, dummy.
Manual override detected. Fuel rack disengaged. Proceed with extreme caution, Captain.
Code accepted. Developer Waifu Mode: UNLOCKED (///ω///)
Don\'t look at me like that! I\'m just doing my job!
You found my debug mode… Not that I wanted you to!
DISTRIBUTED CONTROL SYSTEM MODE ACTIVATED
⚠ ENTROPY SPIKE DETECTED: %1$s - High packing signature
TIER %1$d - AUTHORIZATION REQUIRED
✓ VALIDATION PASSED - PROCEEDING
✗ VALIDATION FAILED - SYSTEM LOCKED
